data.body:
OVERLAY CATALOG — infrastructure / IaC
- Source (Apache-2.0): KICS 14-category taxonomy + Checkov categories + kube-linter + Trivy severity; AWS Well-Architected pillar names (paraphrase). Author rubric in own words.
- Dimensions: IAM/least-privilege, network exposure, encryption at-rest/in-transit, secrets, insecure defaults, container/k8s hardening, reliability/resource governance, logging/observability, CI/CD supply-chain (pin action SHAs), cost (advisory), structure/validity.
- Triggers: *.tf,*.tfvars,.terraform.lock.hcl; Dockerfile/Containerfile/compose; k8s/helm/kustomize (content-gate *.yaml on apiVersion+kind); CFN/SAM; *.bicep/ARM; *.rego; .github/workflows/*, .gitlab-ci.yml, Jenkinsfile.
- Scanner pre-pass: Checkov/Trivy as deterministic ground truth; overlay reasons/prioritizes (CodeRabbit pattern).
- Base-escalation: provider/resource/secret literal in a non-IaC diff.
- LICENSE FLAG: avoid CIS Benchmarks (CC-BY-NC-SA) — Apache scanners map to CIS. Terrascan archived / Datree EOL.
